name: Sumpter Outpost
description: This lot is perfect for any outdoor enthusiast. It is an improved lot with two full hookup graveled RV/trailer pads (electricity including two 30 and 50 amp plugs along with 110, city water, and septic). There is also enough space for a third RV/Trailer to park on the east side as well. This nearly quarter acre parcel sits right at the corner of Granite and Ibex with direct access to hundreds of miles of back country trails for your off-road expeditions (ATV, snowmobile, or any other OHV). Campfires are permitted as long as there is not a burn ban in the adjacent national forest. This lot is close enough to walk to town yet has the feel of being in the woods. From this lot you are also in walking distance of all of the nature and trails the area has to offer.
sourceName: Sumpter Wooded lot - Two RV Pads - All Utilities - Walk to Town or Trails

name: Alamogordo Build
description: Located in the Dog Canyon neighborhood about 10 miles south of Alamogordo, this ten acre lot corner lot is located on the southeast corner of Desert Air Road and Valmont Drive. There is power available and all roads are paved. This is a great lot in a great region. There may even be the possibility of dividing this parcel giving you the opportunity to develop multiple lots.
sourceName: Alamogordo New Mexico 10+ Acres - Paved Roads - Power - Huge Views

name: Winnemucca Mesa
description: This ten acre parcel is located directly on HWY 95 just north of Winnemucca, Nevada. It would make for a spacious homesite with easy access. It could also be used as a potential billboard lot with room for a few. Being zoned M-3, in addition to residential it can be used for agricultural and livestock activities, a campground, and more. Among others, a conditional use of this property includes commercial uses. Now is the time to invest. Parcels of this size in this area on the highway do not come available very often.
sourceName: 10 Acres - HWY 95 Frontage - Homesite and Potential Billboard Lot - Winnemucca

name: Paradise Valley Reserve
description: This five acre corner lot is located on the only paved road in the Paradise Valley Estates north of Winnemucca, and has power to the lot. This is the perfect location to build your home or use it as a getaway space to enjoy some peace and quiet. This parcel is accessible with a 2WD (being on a paved road). This bedroom community features wonderful lot sizes, great views, and wide-open spaces. Paradise Valley is a picturesque gateway to the Santa Rosa Mountains. This lot is perfect to build your house or cabin, or just use it as a home base for your area recreational activities.
sourceName: Paradise Valley 5 Acres on a Paved Road with Power - Corner Lot

name: Salome Vista
description: Three adjacent lots totaling over 1/2 acre which are located directly on paved Harquahala Road in the Castle Lakes Subdivision in Salome, Arizona. There is power at the lots so only a drop is needed. Castle Lakes lies just south of HWY 60. These lots give you the flexibility to park your RV or build. Manufactured homes and stick built are also allowed. You can even get creative and build whatever it is you can dream up. These lots also allow for a shed, pole barn or storage container to hold all of your recreational vehicles while camping on the lot. There is no active HOA or CC&R's. These are great lots for both snowbirds and those looking to make a permanent residence.
sourceName: Three Adjacent Lots on Paved Harquahala Rd - Over 1/2 Acre - RV's OK - Power

name: Rodeo Overlook
description: Great 11+ acre parcel on Estrella Parkway off NM HWY 80 about 6 miles north of the town of Rodeo. The parcel has 2WD access on a well maintained dirt/gravel road. It has been surveyed and has electricity available. There are huge views of both the Chiricahua Mountains to the west and several mountains to the east. With no light pollution, night skies are an astronomers dream. This lot is large enough to let you imagination run wild with room left over after. These lots rarely come available, so don't let this one slip away and invest now.
sourceName: Surveyed 11+ Acre Parcel Near Rodeo - Just Off HWY 80 At Arizona Border - POWER

name: Deming Vista
description: Now available, two adjacent five acre parcels totaling ten acres in the Akela Subdivision at the Akela exit off I-10. Power is available and is at the property. This property has easy 2WD access right off the Akela exit of I-10 just south of HWY 549 in East Deming where the proposed casino will be located. These lots will make a great spot to call home or even snowbird for the winter. You could even sell one to recover your cost and still have a nice five acre lot for yourself! Or, you can have an even larger spread by purchasing the adjoining five acre corner lot to the North that we also have for sale.
sourceName: 10 Acres - Great Road - Power at the Lot - Adjacent 5 Acres Also Available

name: Rome Pasture
description: This parcel is located just south of HWY 95 on the Old Ion Hwy (frontage on the west side of the parcel). The parcel borders thousands of acres of BLM to the north. The area is abundant in wildlife. In addition to the wide variety of birds, you can also spot mule deer, coyotes, black bear, and bobcats. White tailed jackrabbits roam the area as well. Wildlife may be secondary though to the ATV/motorcycle riding that can be had. This parcel is level to very gently sloping.
sourceName: Rome Oregon 20 Acres Located on Old Ion HWY - Borders BLM

name: Salmon Bluff
description: Now available, a view lot overlooking Williams Lake. Being elevated with some slope, it provides huge unobstructed views of the lake with AMAZING sunsets. Williams Lake lies about 12 miles SW of Salmon. There is power at the corner of Cliff and Deep Trail Drive and there is a community water and sewer system. You could also apply for a well and/or septic if you choose. Some in the area also haul water and use solar for their power. This is a wonderful location near world class fishing and great outdoor adventures like hiking, biking, and ATVing.
sourceName: Williams Lake, Salmon Idaho - Great Lot with Unobstructed View of the Lake

name: Talkeetna Cove
description: Located directly on well maintained Caswell Lakes Road, this lot has huge development potential. There is power available at the lot as well. This a wonderful location for a permanent residence or simply a summer getaway. Caswell Lakes is about 15 minutes north of Willow and about 45 minutes from the larger town of Wasilla. Less than 30 minutes to the north lies the historic town of Talkeetna
sourceName: Nearly 3/4 Acre Lot on Caswell Lakes Road - Power - Developed Area by Lakes

name: Grass Valley Ridge
description: Located just 12 miles south of Winnemucca, this 20 acre ranch is a corner lot at the corner of Logan Road and Ruiz Road. There is some development nearby but with a property this size it will feel much larger with all of the open space around. There is slight slope from east to west which will provide for good drainage. The property is currently off-grid with the closest power about 1900 feet to the west.
sourceName: 20 Acres in Grass Valley South of Winnemucca - Road Accessible

name: Keno Parcel
description: Wonderful timbered and level lot with power, located just outside of Keno, Oregon. Measuring in at over an acre, this lot has the feel of full-time camping, tucked in a secluded and quiet residential neighborhood. Build your home or bring your mobile and stretch out as there is plenty of room to do so.
sourceName: Keno Oregon Heavily Wooded Building Lot - Over One Acre - Power

name: Paradise Valley Ridge
description: This nearly nine acre parcel is located at the corner of State HWY 290 and paved Godchaux Road in the Paradise Valley Ranchos north of Winnemucca, Nevada. It would make for a spacious homesite with easy access. There is power available. Now is the time to invest. Parcels in this area with this kind of access do not come available very often.
sourceName: Corner of HWY 290 & Paved Godchaux Road- 9 Acres - HWY Frontage - Paradise Valley Near Winnemucca

name: Deming Overlook
description: Now available, a five acre corner lot in the Akela Subdivision at the Akela exit off I-10. Power is available and is at the property. This property has easy 2WD access right off the Akela exit of I-10 just south of HWY 549 in East Deming where the proposed casino will be located. This lot will make a great spot to call home or even snowbird for the winter. If you would like even more space the adjoining 10 acres are also available.
sourceName: 5 Acre Corner Lot - Great Road - Power - Adjacent 10 Acres Also Available

name: Mill City Homestead
description: Great highway acreage in Nevada! This nearly 10 acre property lies approximately 5 miles south of I-80 at Mill City directly on HWY 400. It is accessed by the paved highway and has great views in all directions. Use this property to create your homestead or just as a base camp for your outdoor recreational activities.
sourceName: Nearly 10 Acres on HWY 400 - Pershing County - Highway Frontage

name: Mesita Ridge
description: Two adjacent riverfront lots in the Rio Grande River Ranches Subdivision of Costilla County, Colorado. At an elevation around 7500 feet the air is clean and the skies are bright. Great roads make these lots easily accessible at all times. The Rio Grande River adjoins these properties to the west, which makes these truly riverfront lots. The Lobato Bridge (Road G Bridge) is the southern most crossing over the river in Colorado and is just a mile south of these lots. Use these lots to camp, recreate, or just enjoy some peace and quiet away from it all. Your options are limitless.
sourceName: Two Adjacent Riverfront Lots - Camping and Recreational Use - South-Central Colorado

name: Rome Stake
description: Wonderful 9.01 acre parcel in southeastern Oregon (10 acres less road easement). This parcel is located just west of HWY 95 off Tudor Road. It is split by North Fork Ryegrass Cr. Road (also referred to as Bone Creek Spur Road), effectively giving you two nearly five acre parcels (see plat map). This area is abundant in wildlife. In addition to the wide variety of birds, you can also spot mule deer, coyotes, black bear, and bobcats. White tailed jackrabbits roam the area as well. Wildlife may be secondary though to the ATV/motorcycle riding that can be had.
sourceName: Nearly Ten Acres with Platted Road Access - Southeastern Oregon

name: Deming Homestead
description: Southwestern Homesites is located in southwest Deming, New Mexico. These five lots combine to be 4.6 acres total. They are located at the end of pavement on Amado Rd SW. These are flat lots and include the corner lot. There is power to the lots and they are level and ready to build. These lots have spectacular views and are in a quiet area with very little traffic.
sourceName: Five Lots Totaling 4.6 Acres in SW Deming - Paved Road - Power - Includes Corner Lot

name: Christmas Valley Bluff
description: This parcel is located in the larger acreage area of the Christmas Valley Townsites to the east of the core area. At over 2 1/2 acres, you will have plenty of room to build out everything you need. The lot is level and has great access off Tinsel Road. Being located in the townsite, this parcel has both electricity and water available at the lot. If elbow room and peace and quiet is what you are looking for this is the lot for you. Camping is also permitted on this parcel per county code.
sourceName: Christmas Valley Mini Ranch - Acreage - Utilities at the Lot

name: Welton Retreat
description: Great corner building lot located a few miles east of Welton in Southern Arizona. This property is perfect for the snowbird looking to stay warm in the winter. Build yourself a place to call your own. Zoned R-1-40, this parcel allows for one single family dwelling per 40,000 square feet of lot size. This means that there will not be residences on top of one another. This zoning also allows for raising of small farm animals for domestic use. Large animals such as horses are limited to one animal per 10,000 square feet. We did see a few RV's out here when we visited, and it sounds like enforcement of RV use is by neighbor complaint, so a good chance RV use would not be an issue. You can also apply for a variance or conditional use permit for mobile and RV use.
sourceName: Southern Arizona 1 Acre Corner Building Lot Near Welton - Yuma County

name: Tres Piedras Acre
description: Now available, two lots totaling over 1.4 acres which includes a corner lot. Tres Piedras lies less than 20 minutes northwest of Taos off highway 64. Named for three outcroppings of granite, the community was once a popular stop on the Chili Line railroad running between Antonito, CO and Santa Fe NM. With wide open spaces, Tres Piedras is a wonderful spot to build a permanent home or just visit with your RV. Either way you are encouraged to take advantage of all of the outdoor adventures the area has to offer.
sourceName: Two Adjacent Oversized Lots - Over 1.4 Acres - Corner Included - NW of Taos - Good Roads

name: Dateland Basecamp
description: Located on PAVED Ventura Road with power just three miles NE of Interstate 8 exit 67 in Dateland, AZ. This property is perfect for the snowbird looking to stay warm in the winter. Build yourself a place to call your own. With rural residential zoning, there will not be residences on top of one another. You can raise small farm animals for domestic use. Large animals such as horses are limited to one animal per 10,000 square feet. We did see a few RV's out here when we visited, and it sounds like enforcement of RV use is by neighbor complaint, so a good chance RV use would not be an issue. You can also apply for a variance, rezoning, or conditional use permit for mobile and RV use.
sourceName: Yuma County - Paved Road with Power - Affordable One Acre Lot for the Snowbird Near Dateland

name: Deming Build
description: This 5+ acre lot is located directly on paved Hermanas Road just south of the Hermanas/Rockhound Road intersection. Power is available and is at the property.
sourceName: 5 Acres on Paved Hermanas Road - Power Available

name: Rome Reserve
description: This parcel is located in Rome, in Southeastern Oregon just north of HWY 95. The area is abundant in wildlife. One of the main attractions of the area is fishing the Owyhee River. Located about one mile from this parcel, world class Brown Trout, Channel Catfish, and Smallmouth Bass awaits. If you are looking for peace and quiet and the feeling you are far from civilization this is the land for you (however you are only about 90 miles from Boise).
sourceName: Rome Oregon 20 Acres - One mile from Owyhee River

name: Paradise Valley Mesa
description: This five acre parcel is located off the 101 Ranch Road in a more secluded section of the Paradise Valley Estates, about 18 miles north of Winnemucca, NV. Paradise Valley is a picturesque gateway to the Santa Rosa Mountains. This lot is perfect to build your house or cabin, or just use it as a home base for your area recreational activities.

You will have easy access to groceries as well as restaurants, gas stations, post offices, and banks. This nearly three acre lot affords you the privacy that the city does not. Bring your horses and livestock, mobiles are allowed. This is a great location with Albuquerque to the west and Santa Fe and Taos to the north.

Use this lot to build or camp, either way enjoy some peace and quiet away from it all. Your options are limitless. By code as an owner of this land you may use it to camp. A great lot on a paved road at an affordable price; don't let this one slip away.

description: This nearly one acre lot is located in the El Rancho Grande subdivision on Via Jero Avenue, with power available. The parcel is located about eight miles south of Moriarty and just west of HWY 41. This established subdivision is a slower pace of life than those to the north, but you will have easy access to groceries as well as restaurants, gas stations, post offices, and banks about 10 minutes away.
sourceName: El Rancho Grande - Nearly One Acre - Good Roads & Power Available

name: Beryl Acre
description: Two adjoining lots with power across the street. These are located within the Beryl Townsites in an area of development. Beryl is an unincorporated community located west of Cedar City and north of St. George. You will find wide open spaces and great views from the lots. A great place to build or just visit while vacationing.
sourceName: 1/3 Acre - Two Adjoining Lots - Power - Good Roads

name: Moriarty Homesite
description: This oversized lot is located just two lots east of the main north/south road and power. It is located in the northern section of the Estancia Ranchettes subdivision. The subdivision is conveniently located just east of Albuquerque off of I-40 exit 203. Out here you can get away from the crowds of the city yet still be close enough to drop in when you like.
sourceName: Oversized Lot - Two Lots From Main Road and Power - Desireable Location

name: Christmas Valley Overlook
description: A nice level lot in the Christmas Valley Townsite. Well maintained roads make this lot easily accessible. This parcel is located in the city so it has water available. Use this lot to build or camp, either way enjoy some peace and quiet away from it all. Your options are limitless. By code you can camp up to 7 days a month as an owner of this land. A great lot at an affordable price.
sourceName: Camping Permitted - Great Southern Oregon Lot with Multiple Uses - 1/3 Acre

name: Willcox Retreat
description: Arizona Bell Ranch is located under five miles north of Willcox, Arizona. Unlike many areas in Cochise County, there is development in this subdivision. This lot lies just south of Saddle Road and measures a total of one acre. It is buildable, and NOT in a flood zone. This is a great area to either build or simply start your land portfolio at an affordable price.
sourceName: One Acre Lot in Southeast Arizona - Near Wilcox

name: Elko Basecamp
description: This parcel is located directly on the corner of well-maintained gravel Coal Mine Road and 22nd, north of I-80. At over an acre in size, this makes for a wonderful building lot or as a base camp for your recreational activities. There are huge views of the surrounding mountains in a peaceful setting.
sourceName: Great Corner Lot Located Directly on Coal Mine Road - Huge Mountain Views

name: Las Vegas Camp
description: The Carriage House is located just one block from the world famous Las Vegas Strip, between the MGM Grand and the Planet Hollywood Hotel and Casino. This area is packed with attractions, and the amenity rich Carriage House is situated in the middle of it all. Within easy walking distance of top-notch dining, entertainment, and nightlife and just a short drive, cab or monorail ride away from many other attractions.
sourceName: Las Vegas Timeshare – One Block Off the Strip

name: Yucca Mesa
description: Located on Angell Road in the Golden Valley Ranchos South Subdivision. This area is south of Kingman and northeast of Lake Havasu City near Yucca. It has easy access off Interstate 40 at exit 28 (W. Dean Drive). There is development in the area and it is surrounded by beautiful mountain views, wildlife and desert landscapes. This is perfect for those who want their own piece of land or a vacation spot. This property offers an amazing opportunity to build a tiny house, RV, or mobile home.
sourceName: Yucca AZ Building Lot - 2.35 Acres

name: Paisley Mesa
description: Own your own camping/recreation lot located in the Fremont National Forest in the south central Oregon mountains. Lakeview Pine Estates is a unique subdivision. It is the only small acreage private land in this high mountain lake area, easily accessible in the summer months on well paved and groomed gravel/dirt roads. With an elevation near 7000, in the winter 4X4 and/or ATV/snowmobiles are required to access the land.
sourceName: South Central Oregon Mountain Lakes Area Property - Great for Camping

name: Veguita Bluff
description: This one acre lot is located at the corner of Trevino Avenue and Alvarado Street in the far western portion of the Rio Grande Estates Subdivision, near HWY 60. There is power available at the lot. Being in Socorro County there are no restrictions on this parcel.
sourceName: One Acre with Power - Well Maintained Road - Unrestricted Land

name: Veguita Homesite
description: This 3/4 lot is located directly on HWY 60 in Socorro County southeast of Belen in the Rio Grande Estates Subdivision. This is an unrestricted lot, you can use as you wish. There is power available.
sourceName: 3/4 Acre Lot Located Directly on Paved Highway 60 - Power Available

name: Ojo Caliente Camp
tagline: 1.73 Acres, Rio Arriba County, New Mexico
description: This nearly two acres of unrestricted land is located on the Black Mesa north of Espanola in Rio Arriba County, New Mexico. It has direct road access. There are a few residences on the mesa, but these lots have wide open spaces with huge views. Keep them all and have a spacious property for yourself, of keep a few and sell a few to recover your initial investment. As unrestricted property, you can camp, RV, or build.
sourceName: Four Lots Totaling Nearly Two Acres on the Black Mesa - Direct Road Access

name: Rio Rancho Vista
description: Great 1.07 acre lot in the southern most part of the Rio Rancho Subdivision. This parcel is accessed off Southern Blvd SW and has 2WD road access. There is currently little development in the area so you will not have neighbors. If peace and quiet is what you are looking for this is the land for you!
sourceName: 1.07 Acre Lot in the Southern Area of Rio Rancho on 20th Ave

name: Veguita Stake
description: This one acre lot is located in the southeastern portion of the Rio Grande Estates Subdivision, very near HWY 60. Power is only two lots to the west. Unlike many of the lots in the subdivision that take a 4 X 4 to get to (or have no road at all) this parcel is accessible with a two-wheel drive vehicle and easy to get to over maintained gravel roads (as can be seen in the pictures). Being in Socorro County there are no restrictions.
sourceName: One Acre Lot Near HWY 60 - Huge Views - Great Roads - Power Close

name: Elko Mesa
description: Over 2 1/4 acre lot located west of Coal Mine Road just north of I-80. If seclusion (but still near civilization) is what you are looking for this is the lot for you. This is a great off-grid parcel where you can let your imagination guide you.
sourceName: Humboldt River Ranchos - Over 2 1/4 Acre Mini Ranch - Secluded

name: Sun Valley Homesite
description: Spacious 2.5 acre lot located just south of I-40. It is undeveloped and has potential.
sourceName: 2.5 Acres in NE Arizona Near Petrified Forest National Park

name: Margaret Overlook
description: Two adjacent level lots including a corner lot in the small community of Margaret, Texas. At over 1/3 of an acre these lots sit just off of HWY 98, with road access and power available. Margaret is only six miles northeast of the county seat of Crowell.
sourceName: Two Adjacent Lots in Margaret Texas - Corner Lot

name: Deming Stake
description: This area of New Mexico has many outdoor activities within a short drive. Deming is a hiker’s paradise. Several larger cities lie just to the east including Las Cruces and El Paso, TX. These cities offer all the amenities of any large city. These parcels are located just far enough out of town to give the land the Southwestern touch, but close enough to amenities that you do not have to travel great distances for services.
sourceName: Deming NM 1 Acre Corner Lots with Power

name: Veguita Wilds
description: Located at the corner of Jacinto Street and Ochoa Avenue, these adjoining one acre lots are located in the southern portion of the Rio Grande Estates Subdivision, closer to HWY 60. Jacinto is one of the better and main N/S roads in the subdivision. Being in Socorro County there are no restrictions.
sourceName: Two Acres - Two Adjoining Lots - Includes Corner

name: Tierra Amarilla Basecamp
tagline: 1.06 Acres, Rio Arriba County, New Mexico
description: Over one acre in the Tzama Division area just minutes from Tierra Amarilla, New Mexico. This is two adjoining lots which have platted road access. These undeveloped treed lots will make a great spot for your getaway cabin or just use it to camp for a bit. Either way this affordable acreage will be a great addition to your real estate portfolio. This is a great secluded area with plenty to do nearby. This is close to two major state parks and lakes (Heron and El Vado). Tierra Amarilla is the county seat of Rio Arriba County, so services are available in town.
sourceName: Two Adjacent Lots in Tierra Amarilla - Over One Acre - Wooded

name: Animas Stake
description: Now available, 3.73 Acres in the Rancho Hidalgo Subdivision four miles west of Animas off State Highway 9. This fairly secluded property is one of the more affordable in the area. You will see from the pictures modern homes are starting to pop up just a block away. Power is just a block away as well. There are great mountain views from the property. Buy now while the price is still low before it jumps.
sourceName: Nearly Four Acres Just North of State HWY 9 West of Animas - Secluded

name: Yucca Basecamp
description: Located at the corner of Buckwash and Yucca (now Cherry) Roads in Unit 1 of the Desert Skies Subdivision south of Kingman and northwest of Lake Havasu City. It has easy access off Interstate 40 at exit 20 (Santa Fe Ranch Road). Surrounded by beautiful mountain views, wildlife and desert landscapes, this is perfect for those who want their own piece of land or a vacation spot. This property offers an amazing opportunity to build a tiny house, RV, or mobile home.
sourceName: Desert Skies - Corner Lot - 2.1 Acres - Between Kingman and Lake Havasu

name: Deming Frontier
description: Located at the corner of Blackhawk Drive and Tumbleweed Trail, this pair of adjacent lots total over 1.2 acres. This area is developed with several houses. There is power available and the roads are well maintained. No restrictions, HOA, POA, etc. This area is growing and a planned new casino is on the horizon right down the interstate.
sourceName: 1.22 Acres - Developed Area - Corner Lot - Power

name: Salome Camp
description: Now available, a great lot on well maintained Berry Way in the southern part of the Castle Lakes Subdivision in Salome Arizona. Lying just south of HWY 60, this lot gives you the flexibility to park your RV or build. Manufactured homes and stick built are also allowed. You can even get creative and build whatever it is you can dream up. This lot also allows for a shed, pole barn or storage container to hold all of your recreational vehicles while camping on the lot. There is no active HOA or CC&R's. This is a great lot for both snowbirds and those looking to make a permanent residence.
sourceName: Central Arizona Multi-use Lot - Surveyed in the Rear- Bring Your RV

name: Edgewood Vista
description: Great view lot in the Bella Vista Estates in Edgewood just east of Albuquerque. It is located close to the freeway (I-40) and amenities. You will have easy access to groceries as well as restaurants, gas stations, post offices, and banks. This over half acre lot is heavily wooded for your privacy but sits at the top of a knoll to provide huge views. This is a great location with Albuquerque to the west and Santa Fe and Taos to the north.
sourceName: Bella Vista Estates - Heavily Wooded View Lot

name: Ramah Bluff
description: Pine Meadows Ranches Subdivision is a secluded acreage subdivision in NW New Mexico. It is the ideal location for you to go camping, build your dream home, or simply visit to take in the scenery. Make it your home away from home. Being located in Unit 4, roads in this part of the subdivision are maintained. This over 2.5 Acre lot has huge views as can be seen in the pictures. It is located on well maintained Sutton Drive near the center on Unit 4.
sourceName: Trees - Huge Views - Over 2.5 Acres

name: Elko Cove
description: Affordable 1+ acre parcel in the Humboldt River Ranchos subdivision. There is easy access with good roads to the lot. There are huge views of the surrounding mountains in a peaceful setting.
sourceName: Affordable Lot in Humboldt River Ranchos - Great Access - Power Nearby

name: Salome Ridge
description: Full Time RV permitted. This is a nice secluded lot located on Palm Blvd in the northwestern part of the Castle Lakes Subdivision in Salome Arizona. Lying just south of HWY 60, this lot gives you the flexibility to park your RV or build. Manufactured homes and stick built are also allowed. You can even get creative and build whatever it is you can dream up. This lot also allows for a shed, pole barn or storage container to hold all of your recreational vehicles while camping on the lot. There is no active HOA or CC&R's. This is a great lot for both snowbirds and those looking to make a permanent residence.
sourceName: Full Time RV Allowed - Camp or Build - Southern Arizona - Great Weather

name: Veguita Retreat
description: Located at the corner of Jacinto Street and Quintero Avenue, these adjoining one acre lots are located in the southern portion of the Rio Grande Estates Subdivision, closer to HWY 60. Jacinto is one of the better and main N/S roads in the subdivision. Being in Socorro County there are no restrictions, camp or build, your choice.
sourceName: Off-Grid Dream Property - Two Adjacent Lots - Two Acres - Includes Corner - Bring Your RV

name: Trementina Cove
tagline: 5.25 Acres, San Miguel County, New Mexico
description: This remote corner lot is located in the Ranchos Lake Conchas Subdivision west of HWY 104 between Las Vegas and Tucumcari. There are roads in place for you to be able to drive right to the lot. There are no restrictions so you may use as you see fit.
sourceName: Rancho Lake Conchas 5.25 Acres - Corner Lot - Road Accessible

name: Rio Rancho Acre
description: 1/2 acre lot in the Rio Rancho Subdivision on Solar Drive. This lot has decent road access off of Progress Boulevard in the northern part of the subdivision. There are huge views and wide-open spaces with no current neighbors nearby.
sourceName: 1/2 Lot - Huge Views - Good Road Access

name: Deming Homesite
description: Now available, five acres in the Akela Subdivision at the Akela Flats exit off I-10. Power is about 300 feet to the south should you desire an electrical connection. This is affordable acreage in East Deming just south of the Akela exit where the proposed casino will be located. This lot will make a great spot to call home or even snowbird for the winter.
sourceName: Affordable Five Acre Lot - Cheap Taxes - Power Near

name: Deming Mesa
description: Located directly on paved HWY 549 just a few miles west of the Akela exit off I-10. This is 4 lots totaling a full two acres. These are located very near the proposed casino.
sourceName: HWY 549 Frontage - 4 Lots - Two Acres Total - Great Location

name: Milan Mesa
description: Now available, a level building lot located in Milan, a suburb of Grants, New Mexico. This level parcel lies just west of I-40 and the famous Route 66. Nice lot for a homesite in the area. Don't miss out on this one as prices in the area have soared the last few years.
sourceName: Affordable Lot in Milan, New Mexico - Grants Suburb

name: Deming Outpost
description: Now available, 2 adjacent lots that make up one acre total. These lots have Cana Road frontage which is a well maintained 2WD road right off paved Franklin Road. There is power available to these lots. This is affordable acreage in SE Deming just south of the Akela exit where the proposed casino will be located. These lots will make a great spot to call home or even snowbird for the winter.
sourceName: One Acre - Southern New Mexico - Maintained Road - Power

name: Williford Frontier
description: This is an unrestricted lot in the Pioneer Addition of Ozark Acres near Williford Arkansas. There is power at the street. The lot gently slopes down from the road and would make a great building site for a cabin, tiny home, camper, or RV. Electric service is available at the street if you choose to connect but you do not have to. You can live here year around or use the property as a getaway.
sourceName: Unrestricted Lot in Ozark Acres - Camping Potential - Power Available

name: Moriarty Pull-In
description: If plenty of space and some peace and quiet at an affordable price is what you are looking for look no further. This is two adjacent lots totaling two acres. The lots are located on Casa Del Sol Road. The subdivision is conveniently located just east of Albuquerque off of I-40 exit 203. Out here you can get away from the crowds of the city yet still be close enough to drop in when you like.
sourceName: Two Adjacent Lots Includes Corner - Two Full Acres - Peace and Quiet

name: Veguita Basecamp
description: This one acre lot is located in the southeastern portion of the Rio Grande Estates Subdivision, very near HWY 60. Power is only three lots to the east. Unlike many of the lots in the subdivision that take a 4 X 4 to get to (or have no road at all) this parcel is accessible with a two-wheel drive vehicle and easy to get to over maintained gravel roads (as can be seen in the pictures). Being in Socorro County there are no restrictions.
sourceName: One Acre Lot Near HWY 60 - Great Roads

name: Rio Communities Acre
description: Three adjoining lots totaling 1.5 acres just west of Turbine Rd (has power) and just off of NM 47 (Paved). These are great lots with little to no restrictions.
sourceName: 3 Lots Totaling Nearly 1.5 Acres - Rio Grande Estates, Valencia County NM

name: East Deming Homesite
description: Affordable acreage in SE Deming just south of the Akela exit where the proposed casino will be located. Three adjacent lots totaling one and half acres on well maintained Ocotillo Road. There is power available. These lots will make a great spot to call home or even snowbird for the winter.
sourceName: Three Adjacent Lots on Maintained Ocotillo Road - Power Available

name: Beryl Hollow
description: Six adjoining lots in the Beryl Townsite. Beryl is an unincorporated community located west of Cedar City and north of St. George. You will find wide open spaces and great views from the lots. A great place to build or just visit while vacationing.
sourceName: Beryl UT - Six Adjacent Lots - 1/2 Acre - Quiet with Great Views

name: Moriarty Wilds
description: Now available, a one acre parcel located in the northern section of the Estancia Ranchettes subdivision. Conveniently located just east of Albuquerque off of I-40 exit 203. Out here you can get away from the crowds of town yet still be close enough to drop in when you like.
sourceName: One Full Acre - Estancia Ranchettes - Albuquerque East Valley

name: Moriarty Open Range
description: This is a nice one acre parcel located in the northern section of the Estancia Ranchettes subdivision. Conveniently located just east of Albuquerque off of I-40 exit 203. Out here you can get away from the crowds of town yet still be close enough to drop in when you like.
sourceName: Albuquerque East Valley - One Full Acre

name: Veguita Frontier
description: This one acre lot is located in the eastern portion of the Rio Grande Estates Subdivision, north of HWY 60. This parcel borders the larger parcels to the east so you will have vast wide open spaces. A 2WD road will lead you directly from the HWY to this lot. Being in Socorro County there are no restrictions.
sourceName: One+ Acre Lot - Great Road 2WD Road - Rio Grande Estates, Socorro County NM

name: Tres Piedras Vista
description: Tres Piedras lies less than 20 minutes northwest of Taos off highway 64. Named for three outcroppings of granite, the community was once a popular stop on the Chili Line railroad running between Antonito, CO and Santa Fe NM. With wide open spaces, Tres Piedras is a wonderful spot to build a permanent home or just visit with your RV. Either way you are encouraged to take advantage of all of the outdoor adventures the area has to offer.
sourceName: NW Taos 1/2 Acre Lot

name: Veguita Pull-In
description: This one acre corner lot is located just south of HWY 60 in the eastern portion of the Rio Grande Estates Subdivision, near HWY 60. Being in Socorro County there are no restrictions. Camp or build, use your imagination.
sourceName: Off Grid New Mexico Property - No Restrictions - Corner Lot South of HWY 60

sourceName: Hachita Corner Lot with Power – Great Roads

name: Hachita Plot
description: Affordable lot in the Hachita community in southwestern New Mexico. Now available, a corner lot with power just one lot south of HWY 9. Well maintained 2WD roads lead to the property.
sourceName: Corner Lot Just South of HWY 9 in Hachita - Power at the Lot

name: Kingman Overlook
description: This one acre parcel is just two lots off of the 149 Road (N. Antares Rd), which comes off the historic route 66 near Antares. There is current dirt road access. It is a short drive into Kingman for all your shopping needs. This lot has very low annual taxes. RV camping would be by permit and RV living would require septic installation. The parcel also allows for site built and modular homes in addition to agricultural uses.
sourceName: One Acre - Two Lots From 149 Road - Dirt Road Access

name: Moriarty Hollow
description: Own a piece of the East Valley while it is still affordable. This one acre lot is located in the Estancia Ranchettes subdivision. The subdivision is conveniently located just east of Albuquerque off of I-40 exit 203. Out here you can get away from the crowds of the city yet still be close enough to drop in when you like.
sourceName: One Full Acre East of Albuquerque

description: Now available, an affordable lot in the Hachita community in southwestern New Mexico. This is a secluded lot in the southwestern part of the subdivision. Power is available across the street. The roads are well maintained 2WD roads that lead to the property.
